title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.45.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | minor | `v1.44.0` -> `v1.45.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage</summary>

### [`v1.45.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.45.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.44.0...v1.45.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.44.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1427](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1427)
-   pkg/parsers: Enable GetKernelVersion on FreeBSD by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1425](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1425)
-   Fix a typo that breaks build / vedoring by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1428](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1428)
-   Clean up inconsistent stores also in readers by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1407](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1407)
-   More small locking fixes by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1430](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1430)
-   Don't cross mount points when building change lists by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1434](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1434)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.12.1 to 0.13.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1431](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1431)
-   overlay: allow overlaying on top of zfs by [@​BtbN](https://togithub.com/BtbN) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1432](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1432)
-   Support transient storage mode by [@​alexlarsson](https://togithub.com/alexlarsson) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1424](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1424)
-   Fix minor typo on  containers-storage.conf.5.md by [@​jacksgt](https://togithub.com/jacksgt) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1440](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1440)
-   Replace Locker.Modified with a more correct change tracking by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1436](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1436)
-   Document and improve store locking by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1438](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1438)
-   Avoid unnecessary reloads of store data by [@​alexlarsson](https://togithub.com/alexlarsson) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1439](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1439)
-   userns: stop printing size as escaped string in error and instead use `%v` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1447](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1447)
-   Fix some leaks in maps by [@​haircommander](https://togithub.com/haircommander) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1448](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1448)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.12 to 1.15.13 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1446](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1446)
-   Use unix.Open instead of os.OpenFile for /dev/zfs by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1450](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1450)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.5 to 0.9.6 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1451](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1451)
-   fix: workaround field rename in btrfs-progs 6.1 by [@​chenrui333](https://togithub.com/chenrui333) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1455](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1455)
-   docs: fix fcn name ref for `AssertLockedForWriting` by [@​chenrui333](https://togithub.com/chenrui333) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1458](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1458)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.13 to 1.15.14 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1459](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1459)
-   Define error type for ErrNoAvailableIDs by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1461](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1461)
-   In-process exclusion of readers and writers by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1346](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1346)
-   Make the priority for picking the storage driver configurable by [@​dcermak](https://togithub.com/dcermak) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1460](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1460)
-   Compile regex on demand not in init by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1464](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1464)
-   Create pkg/regexp to better handle init regex by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1465](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1465)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​BtbN](https://togithub.com/BtbN) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1432](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1432)
-   [@​jacksgt](https://togithub.com/jacksgt) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1440](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1440)
-   [@​chenrui333](https://togithub.com/chenrui333) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1455](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1455)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.44.0...v1.45.0

</details>
